original: Most ships do not come with sufficiently hardened systems to stand up to the highly sophisticated forms of electronic warfare we see today. This upgrade attempts to close many loopholes currently exploited by attackers. Wireless communication ports are closed and sensor input is heuristically analyzed for spoofed data containing viruses. High grade surge protectors are installed throughout the ship as well as auxiliary power for many essential systems.\n\n(+25 systems)
